view_business_settings: User can view business settings information.
update_business_settings: User can add/update/remove Company Details/Branding, Identity, Report Structure, Integrations. View Organization Settings permission is required.
view_export_activity: User can view/export activity log of the company. View Organization Settings permission is required.
import_export_business_settings: User can import/export Company Data. Manage Organization Settings permission is required.
manage_custom_domain_mapping: User can add/update/delete Custom Domain Mapping for the company. Manage Organization Settings permission is required.
view_reminders: User can view Company Reminders. View Organization Settings permission is required.
manage_reminders: User can add/update/delete Company Reminders. View Reminders permission is required.
view_user_management: User can view users with access to the company. View Organization Settings permission is required.
manage_user_management: User can add/update/delete users access to the company. View User Management permission is required.
view_insights: User can view Financial Reports of the company.
manage_insights: User can create custom Financial Reports of the company. View Insights permission is required.
export_insights: User can export Financial Reports of the company. View Insights permission is required.
view_coa: User can view the Chart of Accounts of the company.
manage_coa: User can add/update/delete/import the Chart of Accounts of the company. View Chart of Accounts permission is required.
export_coa: User can export the Chart of Accounts of the company. View Chart of Accounts permission is required.
view_transactions: User can view the financial transactions of the company.
manage_transactions: User can add/update/delete the financial transactions of the company. View Transactions are required.
export_transactions: User can export the financial transactions of the company. View Transactions permission is required.
view_opening_balance: User can import/match/delete the uncategorized financial transactions of the company. View Transactions permission is required.
manage_opening_balance: User can view Opening balance transactions of the company. View Transactions and Manage Transactions permissions are required.
manage_uncategorized_transactions: User can set up Opening balance transactions of the company. Manage Transactions permission is required.
